overview.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. operates as a bank and financial holding company in the United States, rest of North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia Pacific, Latin America, and the Caribbean. It operates in three segments: Consumer & Community Banking, Commercial & Investment Bank, and Asset & Wealth Management. The company offers deposit, investment and lending products, and cash management; mortgage origination and servicing activities; residential mortgages and home equity loans; and credit cards, payment solutions, travel services, ...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, JPMorgan Chase's revenue was $168.24 billion, an increase of 0.88% compared to the previous year's $166.78 billion. Earnings were $55.68 billion, a decrease of -2.09%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 24 analysts, the average rating for JPM stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $342.0, which is an increase of 2.56% from the latest price.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Transcript: Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference 2026
data.text: Consumer financial health remains resilient, with stable demand for loans and strong card growth. Market share gains are driven by branch expansion and product innovation, while AI and regulatory changes present both challenges and opportunities. The focus remains on customer experience, omnichannel strategy, and leveraging data for growth.
